title: Simply Alive
description: A pack that BRINGS Minecraft TO LIFE in a vanilla way.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CtSSs_NIB9U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![(Resource Pack Title)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07cc8f12217340051c05cc31fe641093219c8ece.png)

Hello and welcome to my resource/texture pack called Simply Alive! It's a pack that BRINGS Minecraft TO LIFE in a Vanilla way, made with a lot of effort! It brings tons of animations, variations, redesigns and way more!

![Requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a986e292c6ee958eb1169505c54b3a96de394135.png)

- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)
- [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)

OR **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)**

![Planned Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c849f77aedc511b1ecc1b305a68f5af330f1fa23.png)
<details>
<summary>Click to Open</summary>

- Continuity Dependent Features
- Eating Animations
- Improve things (like the armors)
- Improve this description
- More babies :3
- More Polytone Dependent Features
- More variants >:]

</details>

![FAQs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8e85f50e59b0d4d85b8c0fae4d51f98e898c92c.png)
<details>
<summary>Click to Open</summary>

**- When will next update come out?**

Well, this one took 1 year so yeeah, they may take a while.

**- Is there any compatibility texture?**

Not yet, but i do plan to create on the future!

**- Can i give a idea?**

Of course! You can put them on my Discord (or curseforge/video comments).

**- It isn't working for me :(**

Try F3+T, it usually works. If it is still not working, it may be from another texture pack or you don't have the requirements.

</details>

![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b26b61134e15a3090e83246e0da3daefdc88ee3.png)
